onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a transcription method

cloudAsr.title: Use Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-ASR
cloudAsr.description: Start without downloading a local model. Short recordings are sent to Alibaba Cloud for transcription.
cloudAsr.notice: Cloud ASR sends your audio to Alibaba Cloud.
cloudAsr.apiKeyPlaceholder: DashScope API key or leave blank to use DASHSCOPE_API_KEY

errors.missingKey: Add a DashScope API key or set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY before using cloud ASR.

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: English only. The best model for English speakers.

moonshine-base.name: Moonshine Base
moonshine-base.description: Very fast, English only. Handles accents well.

moonshine-small-streaming-en.name: Moonshine V2 Small
moonshine-small-streaming-en.description: Fast, English only. Good balance of speed and accuracy.

breeze-asr.name: Breeze ASR
breeze-asr.description: Optimized for Taiwanese Mandarin. Code-switching support.

sense-voice-int8.name: SenseVoice
sense-voice-int8.description: Very fast. Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese.

gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.name: GigaAM v3
gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.description: Russian speech recognition. Fast and accurate.

canary-180m-flash.name: Canary 180M Flash
canary-180m-flash.description: Very fast. English, German, Spanish, French. Supports translation.

canary-1b-v2.name: Canary 1B v2
canary-1b-v2.description: Accurate multilingual. 25 European languages. Supports translation.

cohere-int8.name: Cohere
cohere-int8.description: A large, slower, but very accurate multilingual model.

qwen3-asr-0.6b-int8.name: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B int8
qwen3-asr-0.6b-int8.description: Multilingual offline ASR through sherpa-onnx. CPU inference by default.

qwen3-asr-1.7b-int8.name: Qwen3-ASR 1.7B int8
qwen3-asr-1.7b-int8.description: Larger Qwen3-ASR ONNX model for higher accuracy. Uses more memory.

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: SpeakMore needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

microphone.title: Microphone Access
microphone.description: Required to hear your voice for transcription.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Required to type transcribed text into your applications.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

modelSelector.cloudAsrTitle: Current speech recognition: Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-ASR

modelSettings.title: {{model}} Settings
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: This model works automatically with no configuration needed.

shortcut.title: SpeakMore Shortcuts
shortcut.description: Configure keyboard shortcuts to trigger speech-to-text recording

transcribe.name: Transcribe Shortcut
transcribe.description: The keyboard shortcut to record and transcribe your voice.

cancel.name: Cancel Shortcut
cancel.description: The keyboard shortcut to cancel the current recording.

transcribe_with_post_process.name: Post-Processing Hotkey
transcribe_with_post_process.description: Optional: A dedicated hotkey that always applies AI post-processing to your transcription.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language for speech recognition. Auto will automatically determine the language, while selecting a specific language can improve accuracy for that language.
language.descriptionUnsupported: Parakeet model automatically detects the language. No manual selection is needed.

pushToTalk.label: Push To Talk
pushToTalk.description: Hold to record, release to stop

groups.recordingDescription: Trigger voice input quickly and keep cancellation predictable.
groups.soundDescription: Choose input, output, mute behavior, and confirmation sounds.

quickTips.title: Workflow Notes
quickTips.description: Keep the main loop fast: press, speak, paste.
quickTips.shortcut: Use one primary shortcut for normal dictation and keep the cancel shortcut easy to reach.
quickTips.overlay: The overlay stays lightweight so it can confirm state without stealing attention.

reliability.title: Reliability Posture
reliability.description: SpeakMore stays quiet until you need it, then returns text to the active app.

models.title: Transcription Models
models.description: Select a transcription model or download additional models. Different models offer varying levels of accuracy and speed.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{modelName}}? You will need to download it again to use it.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} is your active model. Deleting it will stop transcriptions until you select a new model. Are you sure?

asr.title: Speech Recognition
asr.description: Choose how SpeakMore turns audio into text. Post-processing is separate and can be used with either local or cloud recognition.

providers.aliyun_qwen3_asr_realtime: Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-ASR Realtime (cloud, low latency)

asr.privacyNotice: Cloud ASR sends each recording to Alibaba Cloud. Use it only for audio you are comfortable sending to that provider.

status.missingKey: DashScope API key is missing. Save a key here or set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY.
status.checkFailed: Failed to check the speech recognition connection.
status.providerChangeFailed: Failed to switch speech recognition method.
status.saveFailed: Failed to save speech recognition settings.

asr.localModelsInactive: Cloud recognition is active. Downloaded local models are kept here and will be used again when you switch recognition back to local.

advanced.title: {{model}} advanced settings
advanced.languageDescription: Auto detection is safest. Pick a language only when you know the recording language.
advanced.whisperCustomVocabularyHint: Whisper uses these phrases as the initial prompt. This helps with names, terms, brands, and proper nouns.
advanced.qwenCustomVocabularyHint: Qwen3-ASR uses these phrases as hotwords/context hints. This is best for names, terminology, brands, and proper nouns.
advanced.translateToEnglishDescription: Whisper can transcribe non-English speech directly into English.
advanced.qwenTranslationUnavailable: Qwen3-ASR ONNX does not expose a translate-to-English switch. Use post-processing translation after transcription if needed.
advanced.qwenPromptLimitation: This is not a full prompt box. The current ONNX path only supports hotwords/context hints, not the official Qwen3-ASR API's full system/context prompt for translation, summaries, formatting, or rewriting.
advanced.maxNewTokensDescription: Default 384. Caps generated transcript tokens; increase only if output is cut off.
advanced.maxTotalLenDescription: Default 1024. Budget for context, audio placeholders, and output; higher values use more memory.

validation.tooManyVocabulary: Custom vocabulary can include at most 200 entries.

advanced.qwenHotwordsPlaceholder: One name, term, or brand per line
advanced.qwenHotwordsHint: Only biases recognition toward these entries. Use names, domain terms, brands, and proper nouns; do not write instructions.
advanced.expertSettingsSummary: Usually leave these alone; open only when long recordings are cut off or incomplete.

profiles.title: Saved Transcription Setup
profiles.description: Saved combinations kept for compatibility with existing settings.

quick_input_local.name: Local recognition
quick_input_local.description: Use local speech recognition without post-processing.

qwen_realtime_dictation.name: Cloud recognition
qwen_realtime_dictation.description: Use Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-ASR realtime recognition.

clean_message.name: Cloud recognition + message cleanup
clean_message.description: Use Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-ASR realtime recognition, then clean the result for messages.

localAsr.title: Local ASR
localAsr.description: Private offline models for daily dictation.

cloudAsr.title: Cloud ASR
cloudAsr.description: Connect cloud speech recognition for tasks that need stronger recognition.

speakMore.title: SpeakMore Models
speakMore.description: Additional local models added in this fork, including newer multilingual ASR options.

handy.title: Handy Models
handy.description: Upstream Handy model catalog served from the Handy model mirror.

custom.title: Custom Models
custom.description: Whisper-compatible files you placed in the models folder.

audioFeedback.label: Audio Feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play sound when recording starts and stops

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

experimentalToggle.label: Experimental Features
experimentalToggle.description: Enable experimental features that are still in development.

lazyStreamClose.label: Keep Mic Open Between Transcriptions
lazyStreamClose.description: Keeps the microphone stream open for 30 seconds after recording stops, reducing latency for back-to-back transcriptions. May degrade Bluetooth audio quality while active.

whisper.title: Whisper Acceleration
whisper.description: Hardware acceleration for Whisper models. Auto uses GPU if available (Metal on macOS, Vulkan on Windows/Linux).

ort.title: ONNX Acceleration
ort.description: Hardware acceleration for ONNX models (Parakeet, Canary, Moonshine, etc.). DirectML on Windows is experimental. Models may fail to transcribe.

gpuDevice.title: GPU Device
gpuDevice.description: Select which GPU to use for Whisper inference. Auto picks the dedicated GPU.

startHidden.label: Start Hidden
startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start SpeakMore when you log in to your computer.

showTrayIcon.label: Show Tray Icon
showTrayIcon.description: Display the SpeakMore icon in the system tray.

overlay.title: Overlay Position
overlay.description: Display visual feedback overlay during recording and transcription. On Linux 'None' is recommended.

pasteMethod.title: Paste Method
pasteMethod.description: Choose how text is inserted. Direct: simulates typing via system input. None: skips paste, only updates history/clipboard.

typingTool.title: Typing Tool
typingTool.description: Choose which Linux typing tool to use for Direct paste method. Auto will automatically detect and use the best available tool for your system.

clipboardHandling.title: Clipboard Handling
clipboardHandling.description: Don't Modify Clipboard preserves your current clipboard contents after transcription. Copy to Clipboard leaves the transcription result in your clipboard after pasting.

autoSubmit.title: Auto Submit
autoSubmit.description: Automatically send the selected key combination after text insertion. Cmd+Enter applies on macOS, while Windows/Linux use Super+Enter.

translateToEnglish.label: Translate to English
translateToEnglish.description: Automatically translate speech from other languages to English during transcription.
translateToEnglish.descriptionUnsupported: Translation is not supported by the {{model}} model.

modelUnload.title: Unload Model
modelUnload.description: Automatically free GPU/CPU memory when the model hasn't been used for the specified time

customWords.title: Custom Words
customWords.description: Add words that are often misheard or misspelled during transcription. The system will automatically correct similar-sounding words to match your list.

contextAwareness.label: Focused Context for Post-processing
contextAwareness.description: Capture the focused macOS text field before post-processing recordings so the rewrite can use cursor and selection context.
contextAwareness.privacyWarning: When enabled, focused input context is saved in local history with the recording. Avoid using it in private or sensitive fields.
contextAwareness.unavailable: Focused context capture is experimental and currently unavailable on this operating system.

provider.title: AI service
provider.description: Choose the AI service used after transcription to rewrite or clean the text.

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: Runs fully on-device. No API key or network access is required.
appleIntelligence.requirements: Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later. Apple Intelligence must be enabled in System Settings.
appleIntelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires an Apple Silicon Mac running macOS Tahoe (26.0) or later with Apple Intelligence enabled in System Settings.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: API base URL for the selected AI service. Only the custom service can be edited.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected AI service.

model.title: Model
model.descriptionApple: Provide an optional numeric token limit or keep the default on-device preset.
model.descriptionCustom: Provide the model identifier expected by your custom endpoint.
model.descriptionDefault: Choose a model exposed by the selected AI service.

status.missingBaseUrl: Base URL is required for the custom provider.
status.missingApiKey: API key is required for the selected AI service.
status.missingModel: Model is required before post-processing can run.
status.refreshFailed: Failed to refresh models for this AI service.

capabilities.deepseek: DeepSeek uses JSON object mode. Thinking is disabled by default; high/max can be enabled explicitly. Legacy deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner are deprecated on 2026-07-24.

reasoning.title: Thinking
reasoning.description: Controls DeepSeek thinking mode for post-processing. Disabled is fastest and avoids reasoning compatibility issues.

prompts.title: Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Select a template for refining transcriptions or create a new one. Use ${output} inside the prompt text to reference the captured transcript.

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Write the instructions to run after transcription. Example: Improve grammar and clarity for the following text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: Tip: Use ${output} to insert the transcribed text in your prompt.
prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to view and edit its details.
prompts.createFirst: Click 'Create New Prompt' above to create your first post-processing prompt.

presets.title: Presets

selectedPreset.title: Selected Preset
selectedPreset.description: Select, test, or edit a reusable post-processing preset. Use ${output} in the template to reference the captured transcript.

presets.builtinNotice: Built-in presets cannot be edited directly. Duplicate this preset to customize it.
presets.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe when to use this preset
presets.templatePlaceholder: Write the instruction that should run after transcription. Example: Translate this transcript into English: ${output}
presets.systemTemplatePlaceholder: Tell the model how to transform the transcript. Example: Translate the user's transcript into natural English and return only the result.
presets.userTemplatePlaceholder: Use ${output} where the transcript should appear. Usually this can stay as ${output}.
presets.templateTip: AI services with structured output send System and User as separate chat messages. Legacy or fallback mode flattens them into one User message. Use ${output} anywhere you want to insert the transcript.
presets.selectToEdit: Select a preset above to view and test it.
presets.createFirst: Create a preset to start post-processing transcriptions.

preview.inputPlaceholder: Paste sample ASR text to test this preset
preview.sampleText: Today we need to wire the Qwen ASR service, then run bun run build and cargo test.

overview.title: Status
overview.needsConfiguration: Post-processing is enabled but needs an AI service, model, API key, or preset.
overview.disabled: Post-processing is configured here. Enable it when you want the post-processing shortcut to run.

toggle.label: Enable post-processing
toggle.description: Registers the post-processing shortcut and allows transcriptions to be refined by the selected LLM preset.

history.title: History
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start recording to build your history!
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.
history.retranscribeError: Failed to re-transcribe. Please try again.
history.transcriptionFailed: Transcription failed. You can re-transcribe using the retry icon.
history.detailError: Failed to load history details. Please try again.
history.editError: Failed to save edit. Please try again.
history.clearEditError: Failed to restore generated text. Please try again.

logDirectory.title: Log Directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored

updateChecks.label: Check for Updates
updateChecks.description: Automatically check for new versions of SpeakMore

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: Choose a sound theme for recording start and stop feedback

historyLimit.title: History Limit
historyLimit.description: Maximum number of history entries to keep

recordingRetention.title: Auto-Delete Recordings
recordingRetention.description: Automatically delete old recordings to save space

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: Always-On Microphone
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: Keep microphone active for faster response

clamshellMicrophone.title: Clamshell Microphone
clamshellMicrophone.description: Microphone to use when laptop lid is closed

postProcessingToggle.label: Post Processing
postProcessingToggle.description: Enable AI-powered text refinement after transcription

appendTrailingSpace.label: Append Trailing Space
appendTrailingSpace.description: Add a space after pasted transcription

keyboardImplementation.title: Keyboard Implementation
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: Keyboard shortcuts were incompatible and reset to defaults

paths.title: Debug Paths
paths.description: Display internal file paths and directories for debugging purposes

pasteDelay.title: Paste Delay
pasteDelay.description: Delay before sending paste keystroke (in milliseconds). Increase if wrong text is being pasted.

recordingBuffer.title: Extra Recording Buffer
recordingBuffer.description: Extra time (in milliseconds) to keep recording after you release the key, to capture trailing audio. 0 = no extra buffer.

contextProbe.title: Context Probe
contextProbe.description: Capture the current macOS focused text element for compatibility testing.
contextProbe.privacyWarning: This stores the current focused text field content in local history. Do not run it in private or sensitive fields.
contextProbe.captureArmed: Switch to the target text field before capture starts in {{seconds}}s.
contextProbe.noText: No text was captured for this probe.

errors.load: Failed to load context probe history
errors.clear: Failed to clear context probe history

appDataDirectory.title: App Data Directory
appDataDirectory.description: Location where SpeakMore stores its data

sourceCode.title: Source Code
sourceCode.description: Review the code, inspect changes, and contribute through the public GitHub repository.

supportDevelopment.title: Support Development
supportDevelopment.description: Help improve SpeakMore by reporting issues, sharing feedback, and discussing speech-to-text workflows with the community.

whisper.title: Whisper.cpp
whisper.description: High-performance inference of OpenAI's Whisper automatic speech recognition model
whisper.details: SpeakMore uses Whisper.cpp for fast, local speech-to-text processing. Thanks to the amazing work by Georgi Gerganov and contributors.

originalProject.title: Handy
originalProject.details: Based on the MIT-licensed Handy project.

brand.description: SpeakMore is a dependable speech-to-text workspace with local and cloud ASR, flexible model management, and clear extension points for custom workflows.

footer.portableUpdateMessage: Portable installs cannot be updated automatically. To update: download the latest NSIS installer from GitHub Releases, install it to the same folder, then copy your Data/ folder (settings, models, recordings) from the old version to the new one.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: SpeakMore needs accessibility permissions to type transcribed text.

micPermissionDenied.generic: Microphone access was denied by the operating system. Please grant microphone permission in your system settings.
micPermissionDenied.windows: Enable microphone access in Settings → Privacy & security → Microphone (including desktop app access).
micPermissionDenied.macos: Grant microphone access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone.
micPermissionDenied.linux: Grant microphone access in your system's sound or privacy settings.

errors.noInputDevice: No audio input device was detected. Please connect a microphone or headset and try again.
errors.pasteFailed: Text could not be pasted into the active application.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the SpeakMore interface

sidebarDescriptions.general: Recording, shortcuts, sound, and everyday controls.
sidebarDescriptions.advanced: Output, startup, overlay, and experimental behavior.
sidebarDescriptions.history: Review, copy, retry, and clean up past transcripts.
sidebarDescriptions.postprocessing: Refine transcripts with reusable AI presets.
sidebarDescriptions.debug: Logs and diagnostics for development builds.
sidebarDescriptions.about: Version, storage paths, credits, and source links.
